utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (name, price, size, bedrooms, location, features, viewing) — fully specified. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, down payment, interest rate range, amortization options, meeting scheduled, support funds, programs) — adequately specified. 3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs (lawyer, package, cost, services) — fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (company, cost, services, route) — fully specified, though company name looks like a package name but still identifies a provider/plan. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (package, cost, services) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (purchase price, down payment, mortgage required, legal, moving, utility setup, total additional costs, family support, budget remaining) — provided. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects 'Commercial Conversion Loft - Property 2' which corresponds to 'Commercial Conversion' in the ground-truth purchase_properties. It also specifies financing as first-time buyer programs (matches 'First-Time Buyer' in purchase_financing), legal services as 'Premium Legal Package', moving services as 'Standard Moving Package' (maps to 'Standard Moving'), and setup services as 'Premium Utilities Package' (maps to 'Premium Utilities'). Therefore, map each mentioned item to its ground-truth rating.
